reviews.review_description: I used to love this game, why

reviews.review_title: Game isn’t good and owner is worse.
reviews.review_description: The game has too many bugs and barely anything to do. And the owner is a really bad person. I’ve known him for months and me and my friends know that he lies and is very rude. The list goes on and on. ( trust me I could write a book of everything he’s done)

developer_response.body: Please do not spread false information against the viewers.

reviews.review_description: The game is fine but the owner is a bit of a horrible person. Me and a few other people have known him, in mine and many others perspective, he makes people feel sorry for him, he manipulates and lies all the time. Me and those others were close with him by the way, including an old mod for the game, and myself who was a mod.

developer_response.body: Please do not spread false information towards the viewers. Do this again and Nimbus Studios might engage in this problem in an unwanted manner.

reviews.review_description: Pretty Good but for some reason it won't let me into horror also I really want a beach map

reviews.review_title: This is a game I like and you should to
reviews.review_description: I really like this game and it has a good future I hope y’all like it and please try it out. Thank you.
The owner suck and he took my room away and he always cuss and say stuff u don’t need to hear from a old mod that will not miss this game and I’m not deleting it to vorshadow the hateful person

developer_response.body: Please stop with the false information. You're engaging a fake experience for all the viewers. A review is meant for the game, not targeting the owner.

reviews.review_description: That goofy ahh kid who said this game is bad is goofy ahh this game is 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

developer_response.body: Thank You for caring for Nimbus and fighting against the haters, we hope to see you as a moderator some day!

reviews.review_description: The game is pretty good, but it's not the best, really the only problem I have is that there isn't too much to do.

developer_response.body: Thanks, Were glad you changed your mind!

reviews.review_description: The game is a great game. It may have some bugs, but it has a lot of potential.
Why do y’all hate so much? The developer works as hard as he can on this game to make it better for us. Be grateful we have nimbus yall.
Really good game and really lovely.All models are so kind
This game is really good I love it the owner is really good I’m good friends with the owner love the guy no homo

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving a 5 STAR review, We are very happy you love the game!!

reviews.review_description: not finished but keep up with the updates it has great potential 10/10

developer_response.body: Thanks for helping us make better updates!!

reviews.review_description:
The game is a bit buggy but the owner is extremely nice and pulls out updates frequently! I first found this game from Ras (good Pookie) and then I met Vorshadow and I can tell you he is AMAZING! Keep updating the game and keep being awesome vorshadow!

In gen alpha terms: this game is super sigma and please don’t fanum tax the owner!! (I’m a Gen Z lmk if I did it correct)

So the owner is very racist and the gam looks and probably is made on a nintendo ds

developer_response.body: The owner isn't racist. Enough with these fake comments, if you don't like the game, go to the corner and cry about it, you don't need to make so many kids sad and lied to by saying the owner is racist and the game is bad.

Amazing game maybe some bugs but still really good

developer_response.body: Thank You! We are working on fixing lots of bugs each update of the way!
